message.entry: Right hand side must be a column vector.
Input tol may not be achievable by BICGSTABL\n Try to use a bigger tolerance
Right hand side must be a column vector of length {0,number,integer} to match the coefficient matrix.
Input tol is bigger than 1 \n Try to use a smaller tolerance
Preconditioner must be a square matrix of size {0,number,integer} to match the problem size.
Initial guess must be a column vector of length {0,number,integer} to match the problem size.
